title: Drivechains
description: Drivechains are a sidechain design that uses blind merged mining and a miner-mediated withdrawal mechanism to move value between Bitcoin and an auxiliary chain. The design trades federation trust for miner governance and new consensus assumptions.

resources.title: Drivechain Information
resources.notes: Primary overview of the drivechain proposal and its miner-mediated peg model.

resources.title: Bitcoin Layer Two Resources
resources.notes: Curated context for drivechains among Bitcoin layer designs.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for sidechains, mining, and Bitcoin settlement.
